response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned senior engineer with strong software craftsmanship, TDD discipline, and relevant geospatial experience through GISCollective (a GIS platform he founded and maintains). However, the role explicitly requires modern C++ or Rust as primary skill, and his recent decade of work has been dominated by TypeScript/Node.js and DLang. C++ exposure is limited to a brief stint at National Instruments over a decade ago, and there is no Rust experience listed. No demonstrated work on routing engines, tiling pipelines, or large-scale distributed systems at the depth the role implies.
strengths: Founded and maintains a geospatial/GIS platform (GISCollective) — direct domain familiarity with map data
Strong software craftsmanship background: TDD, CI/CD, low-latency systems work at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic handling millions of req/s
Senior-level breadth across systems, comfortable picking up new stacks and operating production services
concerns: C++ experience is minimal and dated (6 months at NI in 2014-2015); no Rust experience listed
No demonstrated experience with routing engines, tile generation, or navigation pipelines specifically
Recent career trajectory is web/full-stack (TS, Node, AWS), not systems programming required for this role
